text.title: AI Diff Size Discipline Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from raw input to validated ai-diff-size-discipline artefact.

step.name: measure
step.action: Compute loc_touched, loc_test_touched, files_touched. Strip generated-code paths from totals.

step.name: classify-units
step.action: Tag semantic units: feature / refactor / fix / docs / test / build. Cross-cutting changes are multi-unit.

step.name: score
step.action: Apply caps: LOC <= 200, files <= 8, units == 1. Any breach drives verdict=split.

step.name: split-plan
step.action: Decompose diff into ordered slices with per-slice acceptance criteria. First slice is the smallest mergeable unit.

step.name: enforce
step.action: If verdict=pass, allow merge. If verdict=split, block merge until author opens the slice PRs. Override only with named reviewer + justification.
